headline: Trump 🍊👑 Slaps Tariffs on Canada 🔥💨 Over Filthy Smoke Invasion 😤🌫️
text:
Donald 'Orange Julius' Trump 🍊👴 just went FULL Karen 😤💢 on Canada 🇨🇦 after wildfire smoke 🌲🔥 turned NYC into an orange-hazed dystopia 🏙️🟠! The Don threatened fresh tariffs 💸🚫 on our northern neighbors, calling their air 'filthy, polluted, and unhealthy' 💨🤢 while accusing them of 'willful negligence' 🙄🔥! Nearly 888 fires are raging across the Great White North, with 190+ in Ontario alone – and 3 MILLION hectares 🔥🌲 turned to crispy toast! Detroit got slapped with the WORST air quality on Earth 🌍😷, followed by Chicago, DC, and NYC in 7th place! 😱🗽

Mark Carney 🧔‍♂️🇨🇦 clapped back, saying climate change 🌡️🌍 is EVERYONE'S responsibility – including Uncle Sam's! Doug Ford 🚗🇨🇦 told US lawmakers to 'send help, not complaints' 🤝🔥, reminding them Canada has helped fight California fires and NC hurricanes! Ontario's dropped over $1B on firefighting since 2018, plus $12B on forest sustainability 🌲💰 – but Republicans are still yelling 'Make Canada the 51st State!' 🗳️🇺🇸 while Canadians hit the brakes on US trips 🚫🧳!

Smoke blanketed the Empire State Building 🏙️🌫️, Statue of Liberty 🗽😶‍🌫️, and even threatened Sunday's World Cup final at MetLife! ⚽🌬️ Outdoor events got cancelled, masks got handed out like candy 🍬😷, and flights got delayed ✈️⏳! First Nations communities like Namaygoosisagagun got 'burnt to ashes' 💔🔥, forcing self-evacuations by boat 🛶😢! Scientists say hot, dry weather + climate change = perfect firestorm recipe 🌡️🔥, and 'weather doesn't care about borders' 🌬️🗺️!

US lawmakers John James, John Moolenaar, Jack Bergman, and Lisa McClain said their 'patience has run out' ⏰💥, threatening direct intervention if Canada doesn't step up! But Ontario's got 150+ fire crews, 80+ water bombers, and helicopters dropping water like it's raining cats and dogs 🐱🐶💦! Rains this weekend might clear the air before Argentina vs Spain kicks off ⚽🌧️ – but Trump's Truth Social meltdown and tariff threats 💸🍊 have relations more tense than a Canadian winter! ❄️😬
